WESLEY, is an American singer, songwriter and musician who gained popularity after participating in the reality television music competition show 'The X Factor USA' as part of his band 'Emblem3'. He is one of the founding members of the American Pop band, along with his friend Drew Chadwick, and his brother Keaton Stromberg. Coming from a family of filmmakers and musicians, his mother is a songwriter and his father a composer, he learned to sing and play instruments at an early age. The Teen Choice Award winner and his band have performed around the world opening for stars like Selena Gomez and Demi Lovato. His bands debut album "Nothing to Lose" landed #5 on the Billboards top 100 and their single sold over 500,000 copies worldwide. WESLEY is a versatile artist who lives and breathes music, a true songwriter and a phenomenal front man performer wether with his band or solo. Stay tuned for more music.
